title: ctenitis coriacea
intro: Ctenitis coriacea is a species of fern, specifically a type of tree fern, native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Ctenitis coriacea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea form or as a decoction to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
